name: Mosaic Manticore
name_jp: モザイク・マンティコア
desc: During the Standby Phase of your next turn after you Tribute Summoned this face-up card on the field: Special Summon, from the Graveyard, as many monster(s) as possible that were used for its Tribute Summon. They cannot declare an attack, and their effects are negated.
mnst_eff: During the Standby Phase of your next turn after you Tribute Summoned this face-up card on the field: Special Summon, from the Graveyard, as many monster(s) as possible that were used for its Tribute Summon. They cannot declare an attack, and their effects are negated.
eff: During the Standby Phase of your next turn after you Tribute Summoned this face-up card on the field: Special Summon, from the Graveyard, as many monster(s) as possible that were used for its Tribute Summon. They cannot declare an attack, and their effects are negated.

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

jp_sets.set: Weekly Shōnen Jump 2007, Issue 2 promotional card
Duelist Road -Piece of Memory- Side: Yami Yugi

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
